headline.zh: 騰訊開源 295B MoE 模型 Hy3，採 Apache 2.0 授權
headline.en: Tencent open-sources Hy3, a 295B MoE model under Apache 2.0 license

detail.zh: 騰訊推出 Hy3 混合專家模型，擁有 295B 參數（21B 啟用參數），採 Apache 2.0 開源授權。該模型在後續訓練中導入高品質數據，效能超越同級模型，並可媲美參數量大 2-5 倍的旗艦開源模型。
detail.en: Tencent released Hy3, a 295B MoE model with 21B active parameters under Apache 2.0 license. It outperforms similar-sized models and rivals flagship open-source models with 2-5x its parameter count.

headline.zh: 微軟為降低 AI 成本，開始擴大採用自家模型
headline.en: Microsoft shifts to in-house models to cut soaring AI costs

detail.zh: 微軟正加入矽谷科技巨頭的省錢行列，透過增加對自家內部 AI 模型的依賴，逐步減少對 OpenAI 等外部高成本模型的支出。這項轉變顯示微軟正試圖在維持 AI 功能的同時，優化其雲端基礎設施的營運利潤。
detail.en: Microsoft is cutting back on AI spending by relying more on its own in-house models instead of expensive external APIs, signaling a strategic shift to optimize cloud infrastructure margins.

headline.zh: Anthropic 將 Claude Cowork 協作平台推向行動端與網頁版
headline.en: Anthropic expands Claude Cowork platform to mobile and web

detail.zh: 原本僅限於桌面應用的 Claude Cowork 代理協作平台，現已正式支援行動裝置與網頁瀏覽器。Max 訂閱用戶可率先體驗跨裝置無縫接軌的自動化工作流，其他方案用戶將於數週內獲得存取權。
detail.en: Anthropic is expanding its Claude Cowork agent platform to mobile and web interfaces. Currently rolling out to Max subscribers, it allows users to manage and monitor multi-step agentic workflows seamlessly across devices.

headline.zh: sqlite-utils 4.0 正式發布，支援資料庫綱要遷移與巢狀事務
headline.en: sqlite-utils 4.0 released with database schema migrations and nested transactions

detail.zh: 知名開發者 Simon Willison 發布 sqlite-utils 4.0，為 2020 年以來首次重大版本更新。新版導入資料庫遷移（migrations）、透過 db.atomic() 實現的巢狀事務，以及複合外鍵支援，大幅提升 SQLite 開發體驗。
detail.en: Simon Willison released sqlite-utils 4.0, the first major update since 2020. It introduces native schema migrations, nested transactions via db.atomic(), and support for compound foreign keys.

headline.zh: SkyPilot 聯手 Hugging Face 推出免傳輸費的跨雲 AI 儲存方案
headline.en: Run AI on any cloud with zero-egress storage via SkyPilot and Hugging Face

detail.zh: Hugging Face 與 SkyPilot 合作推出零資料傳輸費（zero-egress）儲存方案。開發者可在任何雲端平台上執行 AI 工作負載，並直接將資料儲存於 Hugging Face，免去高昂的跨雲資料傳輸成本。
detail.en: Hugging Face partnered with SkyPilot to offer zero-egress storage. Developers can now run AI workloads on any cloud provider while storing data on Hugging Face without incurring steep data egress fees.

headline.zh: Hugging Face 機器人開源庫 LeRobot v0.6.0 發布
headline.en: Hugging Face releases LeRobot v0.6.0 for open-source robotics

detail.zh: LeRobot 釋出 v0.6.0 版本，主打「想像、評估、改進」工作流。此更新優化了實體機器人控制演算法的訓練與評估介面，降低了開發者進入開源具身智能（Embodied AI）的門檻。
detail.en: Hugging Face released LeRobot v0.6.0, focusing on the 'Imagine, Evaluate, Improve' workflow. This update refines training and evaluation pipelines for real-world robotic control, lowering the barrier to embodied AI.

headline.zh: Meta 推出 Muse Image 影像生成模型，支援跨平台社群應用
headline.en: Meta launches Muse Image generator across Instagram and WhatsApp

detail.zh: Meta 超級智能實驗室推出首款影像生成模型 Muse Image，已整合至 Meta AI、Instagram 與 WhatsApp。該模型具備將其他用戶拉入 AI 合照等新穎功能，但也引發了隱私與版權爭議。
detail.en: Meta's Superintelligence Labs launched Muse Image, a new generative model powering image tools across Instagram, WhatsApp, and Meta AI. It features social capabilities like pulling other users into AI-generated photos, sparking privacy debates.

headline.zh: Hugging Face 支援一鍵部署至 Amazon SageMaker Studio
headline.en: One-click deployment from Hugging Face to Amazon SageMaker Studio

detail.zh: Hugging Face 推出全新整合功能，開發者現在可以一鍵將平台上的模型直接導入 Amazon SageMaker Studio 進行訓練與部署，大幅簡化了 AWS 環境下的機器學習工作流。
detail.en: Hugging Face introduced a new integration allowing developers to launch and configure models directly in Amazon SageMaker Studio with a single click, streamlining AWS-based ML workflows.

headline.zh: 面對美國出口管制，DeepSeek 計劃自主研發晶片
headline.en: DeepSeek plans to design its own chips amid US export controls

detail.zh: 面對美方嚴格的半導體出口限制，中國 AI 獨角獸 DeepSeek 計劃自主設計晶片，旨在降低對 NVIDIA 與華為的依賴。此舉顯示出中國頂尖 AI 團隊在硬體供應鏈自主化上的最新嘗試。
detail.en: Facing stringent US export restrictions, China's DeepSeek is planning to design its own silicon to reduce reliance on Nvidia and Huawei, marking a major shift in its hardware supply chain strategy.

headline.zh: AI 資料中心能耗暴增，擠壓美國傳統製造業電網資源
headline.en: AI data center power demands squeeze US manufacturing energy costs

detail.zh: 隨著 AI 資料中心在美國鐵鏽地帶等地區瘋狂擴建，其龐大的電力需求導致當地製造業電費飆升。這項能源爭奪戰正對美國本土製造業復興計劃構成實質威脅。
detail.en: The massive energy consumption of AI data centers is driving up electricity bills for US manufacturers, particularly in the Rust Belt, threatening national plans to revitalize domestic manufacturing.

headline.zh: 開發者使用 GPT-5.5 提示詞建構出用於嵌入 GitHub 程式碼的 Web Component。
headline.en: Developer builds a Web Component for embedding GitHub code using GPT-5.5.

headline.zh: Discord 承認其 AI 審查系統出現 Bug，自五月起誤封鎖了數百名上傳無害圖片的用戶。
headline.en: Discord admits an AI moderation bug has been wrongfully banning users over harmless images since May.

headline.zh: 首例由 AI 代理執行的勒索軟體攻擊曝光，但關鍵決策與憑證提供仍需人類介入。
headline.en: The first AI-agent executed ransomware attack is revealed, though human intervention was still required for key setup.

headline.zh: Solos 推出僅重 19 克的無相機智慧眼鏡 AirGo A6，主打純語音 AI 互動與隱私保護。
headline.en: Solos debuts AirGo A6 camera-less smart glasses weighing just 19g, focusing on voice-only AI and privacy.

headline.zh: sqlite-migrate 釋出 0.2 版，正式宣告退役並轉為 sqlite-utils 4.0 的相容過渡層。
headline.en: sqlite-migrate 0.2 released, retiring the library in favor of a compatibility shim for sqlite-utils 4.0.
